news.title: New U.S. recommendation on hepatitis B vaccine will have dire consequences, studies project
news.summary: Policy that recommends offering hep B vaccine at birth only to babies perceived to be at risk will lead to increased numbers of infected infants, new studies project.

news.title: Supreme Court grapples with multibillion-dollar wave of lawsuits over Roundup cancer claims
news.summary: The Supreme Court seemed divided Monday over whether to block thousands of lawsuits alleging the maker of the weedkiller Roundup failed to warn people it could cause cancer.

news.title: STAT+: Erasca touts strong, though preliminary, results in trial of pancreatic and lung cancer therapy
news.summary: The drugmaker Erasca said results on its experimental pill in a trial of pancreatic cancer and non-small cell lung cancer exceeded its expectations.

news.title: STAT+: Dems say RFK Jr. has a pattern of failing to answer their questions
news.summary: Kennedy broke his pledge to share a controversial contract, highlighting Democrats' frustrations with the health secretary.

news.title: Trump administration warns against using federal dollars on fentanyl test strips
news.summary: The Trump administration underlines a “clear shift away from harm reduction and practices” that it says facilitates illegal drug use.

news.title: STAT+: An insider reveals the real goals of prior authorization
news.summary: Years ago, Archelle Georgiou helped squash prior auths at one of America's biggest health insurers.

news.title: STAT+: Astellas retries XLMTM gene therapy after deaths
news.summary: Veradermics' hair loss pill late-stage trial success, FDA fast-tracks reviews for psychedelics, and more biotech news

news.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about a Lilly deal, an Intellia CRISPR rare-disease treatment, and more
news.summary: Intellia disclosed that a single dose of its gene editing treatment dramatically reduced swelling attacks in patients with hereditary angioedema

news.title: What’s the true risk for eating disorders with GLP-1s?
news.summary: The state of Covid-19 in 2026, a hat to treat depression, and other health news from Morning Rounds

news.title: STAT+: Intellia says CRISPR-based treatment for rare disease reduced swelling attacks in pivotal trial
news.summary: With good results from Intellia, the CRISPR field faces the question: How attractive will the one-and-done approach be to patients and doctors?

news.title: STAT+: Oruka’s long-acting psoriasis therapy posts strong results in mid-stage study
news.summary: A long-acting injectable treatment for plaque psoriasis helped 63% of patients achieve complete skin clearance in a clinical trial, its maker, Oruka Therapeutics, reported.

news.title: STAT+: Veradermics’ hair loss drug succeeds in late-stage trial
news.summary: The company is one of the most advanced players in the hair loss field, which has seen a surge of investor enthusiasm.

news.title: STAT+: Zap in a cap: How one neurotech startup is using a hat to treat depression
news.summary: FDA approved a request from Motif Neurotech, to start an initial feasibility trial to test a brain implant to treat depression.

news.title: NIH-funded research lags in reporting sex differences, new study finds
news.summary: Fewer than half of papers published by NIH-funded researchers analyze or report their data by sex, a new study found.

news.title: What happened to Covid?
news.summary: The thinking about what risk Covid poses — or doesn't pose — has shifted in recent years. What does it mean for you?

news.title: Solace Health expands care navigation services to commercially insured patients
news.summary: Solace previously connected Medicare and Medicare Advantage patients to its services, which are now also available to many commercially insured patients, including UnitedHealthcare and Anthem Blue Cross Blue Shield.

news.title: Utah Medical Licensing Board urges state to shut down Doctronic AI prescribing pilot
news.summary: Doctors in the state of Utah are challenging an artificial intelligence-powered prescription medication refill system they say puts patient safety at risk.

news.title: Humana's CenterWell, Mark Cuban Cost Plus Drugs partner to tackle employers' drug costs
news.summary: The arrangement aims to create new "end-to-end employer prescription solutions" fueled by Cost Plus Drugs' software platform and drug pricing, as well as CenterWell Pharmacy's distribution infrastructure.

news.title: AMA urges lawmakers to implement stronger safeguards for AI chatbots in mental health
news.summary: Recommendations from the organization include enforcing transparency standards, creating a risk-based oversight framework and mandating ongoing safety monitoring.

news.title: A look at payers' attitudes toward specialty drug management
news.summary: Insurers are putting a growing focus on specialty drugs covered under the medical benefit, and on re-evaluating the efficacy of traditional rebate models, according to a new report.

news.title: UnityAI builds out agentic AI for staffing operations to match outpatient clinicians with patient demand
news.summary: Nashville-based health tech startup UnityAI built out an agentic AI platform to streamline day-to-day staff scheduling and match it in real time with patient demand.

news.title: Rethinking Prior Authorization for Better Outcomes
news.summary: Abarca’s Javier Gonzalez explores how trust, tech and policy can transform prior authorization and improve access and efficiency.

news.title: What Healthcare Investors See in Risk Adjustment Due Diligence That Buyers Often Miss
news.summary: Same technology. Same use case. But they were asking questions most buyers never think to ask. That gap is worth examining.

news.title: Health Tech Weekly Rundown: Google invests in AI training for rural health workers; State of genAI adoption in healthcare
news.summary: Google.org and the Johnson & Johnson Foundation announced a $10 million philanthropic collaboration to fund AI literacy training for rural healthcare workers across the U.S., aiming to bridge the adoption gap.

news.title: HCA Healthcare executives shrug off Q1 volumes disruptions, reaffirm FY2026 guidance
news.summary: A sharp end to the flu season and disruptive winter storms dragged the country's largest for-profit health system in January. Executives said there's already signs of recovery since the stumble and pointed to favorable activity among states' Medicaid subsidy programs.

news.title: Lawmakers introduce bipartisan legislation to improve access, quality of care in Medicare Advantage plans
news.summary: The Medicare Advantage Improvement Act of 2026, introduced April 20, aims to “directly address” barriers to coverage and treatment for America’s seniors.

news.title: UnitedHealthcare, Aetna, Cigna tout progress to standardize prior authorization as part of industry-wide commitment
news.summary: Major health insurers are advancing efforts to standardize prior authorization requirements as part of an effort to simplify paperwork for providers and reduce delays in medical care.

news.title: Seaport, Hemab chart courses for $180M IPOs to fund depression, clotting candidates
news.summary: Both Seaport and Hemab are hoping to bring in around $180 million each from their public listings this week, in the latest sign that biotech IPOs are regaining their momentum.

news.title: Compass Therapeutics’ stock heads south after cancer bispecific misses on overall survival
news.summary: Compass Therapeutics shed half its stock price this morning as investors digested its bispecific antibody’s failure to hit an overall survival (OS) endpoint in a phase 2/3 study.

news.title: Astellas thins early pipeline, swaps out struggling rare disease gene therapy
news.summary: Astellas Pharma has done some spring cleaning of its pipeline, dropping two phase 1 candidates and slamming the brakes on a troubled gene therapy.

news.title: Ligand snaps up fellow biotech royalty aggregator Xoma for $739M
news.summary: After Xoma Royalty went on a dealmaking spree last year, the biotech royalty aggregator is now itself being bought out by its peer Ligand Pharmaceuticals.

news.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific sells microbiology business for $1B to European private equity firm
news.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific is shedding its microbiology business to private equity firm Astorg nearly a year after rumors of a potential sale first surfaced.

news.title: Blood test powered by AI shows early promise in monitoring rare childhood cancer
news.summary: A new liquid biopsy test using artificial intelligence models could help spot a rare type of bone and soft tissue cancer that predominantly affects children and adolescents.

news.title: Oruka’s psoriasis data hailed as ‘outright win over Skyrizi,’ spurring big blockbuster forecasts
news.summary: Oruka Therapeutics’ long-acting plaque psoriasis candidate cleared the skin of 63.5% of patients in a phase 2a trial, leading Jefferies analysts to predict the asset could beat out AbbVie’s Skyrizi and generate sales of up to $10 billion. The biotech’s share price opened up 30% at $89.50.

news.title: Intellia races in vivo CRISPR therapy to FDA after phase 3 data paint ‘compelling’ picture
news.summary: A phase 3 trial of Intellia Therapeutics’ in vivo gene editing therapy lonvoguran ziclumeran has hit its primary endpoint, leading the biotech to start a rolling submission for FDA approval.

news.title: Endoscopic procedure can help slow weight rebound from stopping GLP-1 treatment: study
news.summary: A simple outpatient procedure currently used for type 2 diabetes patients in Europe can help those on Eli Lilly’s obesity drug tirzepatide keep most of their weight off when stopping the med.

news.title: Lilly maintains M&A hot streak with $2.3B deal for next-gen JAK inhibitor biotech Ajax
news.summary: Eli Lilly’s run of near-weekly acquisitions still shows no sign of letting up, with the Big Pharma now buying Ajax Therapeutics for its clinical-stage myelofibrosis therapy.

news.title: Tandem Diabetes issues software device correction for insulin pump malfunction
news.summary: Tandem Diabetes Care issued an urgent medical device correction to upgrade the software of its Tandem Mobi insulin pumps that can fail to deliver critical medicine to patients.

news.title: British biotech VC funding shows ‘signs of recovery,’ but IPO rebound yet to materialize
news.summary: The 552 million pounds ($747 million) raised by British biotechs in the first quarter of the year has been hailed as a “sign of recovery,” although an anticipated resurgence of IPOs across the nation has yet to materialize.

papers.title: Test-Time Adaptation for EEG Foundation Models: A Systematic Study under Real-World Distribution Shifts
papers.summary: Electroencephalography (EEG) foundation models have shown strong potential for learning generalizable representations from large-scale neural data, yet their clinical deployment is hindered by distribution shifts across clinical settings, devices, and populations. Test-time adaptation (TTA) offers a promising solution by enabling models to adapt to unlabeled target data during inference without access to source data, a valuable property in healthcare settings constrained by privacy regulations and limited labeled data. However, its effectiveness for EEG remains largely underexplored. In this w
